VERY THIN FUNNEL OBSERVED IN CONTACT WITH THE GROUND FOR A SHORT TIME. TORNADO WAS ASSOCIATED WITH AN OUTFLOW PUSHING SOUTHEAST AND AWAY FROM THE MAIN STORM...WITH LOW CLOUD BASES. DESCRIPTION SOUNDED LIKE A GUSTNADO.
